privileged_info_summary: The task instructs the agent to create a Talon macro and voice command in C:\Users\Docker\AppData\Roaming\talon\user\evidence_logger. All metadata claims exactly match the explicit instructions provided in the task description. However, a major architectural bug exists: the task.json specifies pre_task (setup_task.ps1) and post_task (export_result.ps1) hooks, but neither of these scripts actually exists in the task directory. Because export_result.ps1 is missing, the verifier will perpetually fail trying to read the non-existent C:\tmp\task_result.json.
